description: Use this API to change the value of an integer ICON of the multi-terminal dc line model of a specified multi-terminal dc line. The corresponding character CHRICN is set to ‘$$’. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_mtdclmod_icon(dc, model, j, idata)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the multi-terminal dc line for which model data is to be changed; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model (1 for icon(i), 2 for icon(i+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: idata
parameters.description: New integer icon value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: no model at this dc line.
model at this dc line is aaa not xxx.
no input ICONs used in model.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
